author: anon-13168fa2
content: Added navigation tables to the two new chapters (06-the-guild.md and 03-branches-and-pull-requests.md) matching the brocw PR #2 convention. Updated four adjacent pointers so reading order now threads: Your Workspace → Git: Just Enough → The Guild → How Agents Think (Phase 0/1 boundary), and How We Build → Tracking Your Work → Branches and Pull Requests → The Workshop (Phase 2/3 boundary).
